description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden wardrobe with a natural light brown finish and a subtle wood grain pattern. The front features two vertically aligned panelled doors, each equipped with a small round knob handle, and a single wide drawer at the bottom with matching knobs. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the same wood texture without any additional features or ornamentation. The wardrobe appears sturdy and functional, suitable for storing clothes or other personal items. Its design is simple and modern, making it appropriate for both residential and urban public settings such as lobbies or shared spaces. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of wood, likely with some internal air space and possibly metal hardware for hinges and drawer slides.
description: A tall, light brown wooden wardrobe with two panelled doors and a bottom drawer, featuring round knob handles and a simple, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two panelled doors with round knobs and a wide bottom drawer, all in a light wood finish.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat wooden surface with visible wood grain and no additional features.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a seamless, unadorned wooden back panel with a consistent wood grain pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing a plain wooden surface with no handles or openings.
